conservative.name: Wolf's Cunning
conservative.requirements: 4 available favour, Strength 3+, Agility 3+. Must be hidden from the enemy

boon.description:
Special: If you and your allies are hidden from the enemy when you roll initiative at the beginning of an encounter, you may spend 4 favour to play this card. When you and all allies within close range who are hidden from the enemy roll for initiative, you may add to you and your allies' dice pools, and your initiative checks gain:
Add to the results pool

reckless.name: Wolf's Cunning
reckless.requirements: 4 available favour, Strength 3+, Agility 3+. Must be hidden from the enemy

boon.description:
Effect: If you and your allies are hidden from the enemy when you roll initiative at the beginning of an encounter, you may spend 4 favour to play this card. When you and all allies within close range who are hidden from the enemy roll for initiative, you may add to you and your allies' dice pools, and your initiative checks gain:
You are Invigorated for 2 rounds
